description: Send notifications to your own Jira destination through the UnitySVC gateway. POST the unified message envelope {title, body, type, format}; the gateway composes an Apprise jira:// URL from your stored secrets and delivers via apprise.unitysvc.dev. The free apprise channel uses your own stored credentials; the apprise-plus channel binds extra per-enrollment destinations via parameters. The gateway/gateway-plus channels transform the envelope directly into a Jira REST API v2 issue payload delivered straight to your Jira instance (no Apprise).
name: msg-to-jira

request.template: {"urls":"jira://${ customer_secrets.{{ params.apikey_secret }} }","title":{* _escape_json(_body.title or "") *},"body":{* _escape_json(_body.body or "") *},"type":{* _escape_json(_body.type or "info") *},"format":{* _escape_json(_body.format or "text") *}}
{"message":{* _escape_json((_body.title or "")..(( (_body.title or "") ~= "" and (_body.body or "") ~= "") and "\n" or "")..(_body.body or "")) *}}
{"message":{* _escape_json((_body.title or "")..(( (_body.title or "") ~= "" and (_body.body or "") ~= "") and "\n" or "")..(_body.body or "")) *}}
